summary: Agent profile feature fully tested. Backend API tests (9/9 passed) verified user profile CRUD, created_by field on properties, and created_by_info population. Frontend tests verified admin panel Users tab, profile edit dialog, property creation form, agent info overlay on property cards, property detail scroll-to-top behavior, and SearchBar mobile responsiveness.

issues: Minor: DialogContent accessibility warning - missing aria-describedby (not blocking functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns access_token and user info
Backend: GET /api/users returns list with profile fields (nombre_completo, telefono_whatsapp, foto_perfil)
Backend: POST /api/users creates agent with profile fields
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/profile updates user profile
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/profile returns user profile
Backend: POST /api/properties sets created_by field from logged-in user
Backend: GET /api/properties returns created_by_info with populated user profile data
Backend: GET /api/properties/featured returns created_by_info for all featured properties
Backend: GET /api/properties/{id} returns created_by_info on single property
Backend: Non-admin users get 403 on GET /api/users (authorization working)
Frontend: Admin can navigate to Users tab
Frontend: Users list shows 'Perfil' button for each user
Frontend: Profile edit dialog shows Nombre Completo and Teléfono WhatsApp fields
Frontend: Profile edit dialog allows uploading Foto de Perfil
Frontend: Properties tab shows Add Property button and property list
Frontend: New Property dialog has all required fields (Title, Price, Location, etc.)
Frontend: Agent info overlay appears on property cards when agent has profile data
Frontend: Agent overlay shows name, avatar placeholder, and WhatsApp button
Frontend: Property detail page scrolls to top on navigation (scrollY=0)
Frontend: SearchBar is responsive on mobile (width=358px fits 390px viewport)
Frontend: SearchBar uses 2-column grid layout on mobile
Frontend: No horizontal scroll on mobile viewport
critical_code_review_comments: INFO: Existing properties created before the feature don't have created_by field, so agent overlay won't show for them. This is expected - only new properties will have agent info.
INFO: Agent name in overlay truncates to ~12 characters with ellipsis on mobile - acceptable UX behavior
seed_data_creation: Created TEST property (179947e5-8546-49fd-b1e0-95abfba736ed) to verify agent info overlay - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent profile feature is fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints for user profile CRUD work correctly. Properties created by authenticated users now store created_by and GET endpoints populate created_by_info with agent's profile (nombre_completo, telefono_whatsapp, foto_perfil). PropertyCard.jsx displays agent info overlay in bottom-right corner when creator has profile data. Note: Only properties created AFTER this feature was implemented will show agent overlay - existing properties don't have created_by field.

features_verified.admin_users_tab: VERIFIED - Shows all users with Perfil button for profile editing
features_verified.profile_edit_dialog: VERIFIED - Opens with Nombre Completo and Teléfono WhatsApp fields
features_verified.property_creation: VERIFIED - Admin can create properties from Properties tab
features_verified.created_by_info_api: VERIFIED - Properties endpoint returns created_by_info with user profile
features_verified.agent_info_overlay: VERIFIED - Shows on property cards when agent has profile data
features_verified.scroll_to_top: VERIFIED - PropertyDetailPage scrolls to top (scrollY=0) on load
features_verified.searchbar_mobile: VERIFIED - Responsive design, fits 390px viewport, 2-column grid
